queries.question: Show all sommeliers and also show the bartenders working at The Rooftop Lounge.
queries.sql:
SELECT Sommeliers.FullName
FROM Restaurants JOIN Sommeliers ON Restaurants.id = Sommeliers.restaurantId
UNION
SELECT Bartenders.FullName
FROM Restaurants JOIN Bartenders ON Restaurants.id = Bartenders.restaurantId
WHERE Restaurants.name = "The Rooftop Lounge"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
    ?sommeliers a :Sommeliers .
    ?sommeliers p:hasRestaurants ?restaurants .
    ?sommeliers p:name ?fullname .
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
    ?bartenders a :Bartenders .
    ?bartenders p:hasRestaurants ?restaurants .
    ?bartenders p:name ?fullname .
    ?restaurants p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "The Rooftop Lounge")
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show sommeliers and bartenders working at The Rooftop Lounge.
queries.sql:
SELECT Sommeliers.FullName
FROM Restaurants JOIN Sommeliers ON Restaurants.id = Sommeliers.restaurantId
WHERE Restaurants.name = "The Rooftop Lounge"
UNION
SELECT Bartenders.FullName
FROM Restaurants JOIN Bartenders ON Restaurants.id = Bartenders.restaurantId
WHERE Restaurants.name = "The Rooftop Lounge"
